title: 2025-12-16 TACO Pressure Index Update: Low at 6.35
description: Fresh macro pressure read for 2025-12-16: the TACO Pressure Index closed at 6.35/100, signaling a low pressure regime as volatility and equity stress shaped the daily read. See the chart pack, score regime, and what drove the latest reading.
hero_summary: This custom framework combines equities, front-end rates, inflation expectations, and volatility into one daily score. On 2025-12-16, the score printed 6.35/100 in the low regime, with volatility and equity stress doing most of the work.
